ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "compiler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compiler used in the project */,
  "framework_id" INTEGER /* ID of the framework used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
column_names: ID of the compiler used in the project
ID of the framework used in the project
